story.artifact_power: The city's central power — shut it down to break the signal.
story.greeting: Pirate, your mission on Neon City Island begins now — listen closely.
story.act1: On Neon City Island, glowing towers hum with energy while neon lights flicker through endless streets. In the shadows moves a cyber-enhanced monkey, its mind enslaved by Doctor Krit's signal, controlling the city's systems like a living network. At the heart of the metropolis lies the Neon Core, pulsing with power. We must reach it, shut it down, and free the monkey before the entire city turns against us.
story.act2: The cyber monkey tightens its grip on the city's network. Every system Pirate touches pulses with corrupted energy — but the path to the Neon Core is becoming clear.
story.act3: The Neon Core is within reach. One final push and Doctor Krit's hold over this glowing city will be broken forever.
story.goal: Pirate, solve every challenge, reach the Neon Core, and free the city from Doctor Krit's control.

stages.title: Pirate enters Neon City Island
stages.mechanic_reason: True/false statements warm up the player with multiplication and division facts in a city context.
stages.success_message: Sharp thinking, Pirate! The neon streets are yours!

rounds.title: Pirate enters Neon City Island
rounds.statement: 6 neon buses with 8 passengers each means there are 48 passengers in total

rounds.title: The cyber monkey controls the traffic
rounds.statement: 54 energy cubes shared between 6 towers means each tower gets 8 cubes

rounds.title: The city lights begin to flicker
rounds.statement: 7 drone groups with 6 drones each makes 42 drones in total

rounds.title: The Neon Core distorts the network
rounds.statement: 63 chips shared between 9 hackers gives each hacker 6 chips

rounds.title: The streets pulse with energy
rounds.statement: 8 power stations with 7 energy cells each creates 56 cells in total

stages.title: Pirate walks through the glowing market
stages.mechanic_reason: Two-step word problems build on multiplication and division with addition/subtraction.
stages.success_message: Brilliant, Pirate! You cracked the city's code!

rounds.title: Pirate walks through the glowing market
rounds.prompt: 8 neon taxis carry 7 passengers each. Then 12 passengers leave the station. How many passengers remain?

rounds.title: The cyber monkey hacks the towers
rounds.prompt: 72 energy cubes are shared equally between 8 towers. Then each tower gains 3 more cubes. How many cubes does each tower have now?

rounds.title: Neon drones race above the city
rounds.prompt: 9 drone groups have 8 drones each. Then 18 drones lose power. How many drones still work?

rounds.title: Pirate breaks into the control grid
rounds.prompt: 84 data chips are shared equally between 7 hackers. Then each hacker finds 5 extra chips. How many chips does each hacker have?

rounds.title: The Neon Core overloads the city
rounds.prompt: 9 power towers generate 8 energy cells each. The city immediately uses 26 cells. How many cells remain?

stages.title: The neon streets shift around Pirate
stages.mechanic_reason: Corridor choice tests whether the player correctly applies order of operations vs brackets.
stages.success_message: Correct path, Pirate! The city opens up for you!

rounds.title: The neon streets shift around Pirate
rounds.question: Pirate sees 8 charging stations with 7 batteries each, then 12 batteries shut down. Which path shows the remaining batteries?

rounds.title: The cyber network becomes unstable
rounds.question: 72 energy cubes are shared into 8 towers, then each tower triples its energy. Which path shows the final amount per tower?

rounds.title: The monkey controls the traffic systems
rounds.question: 9 robot groups carry 7 batteries each, then 14 batteries are destroyed. Which path shows the remaining batteries?

rounds.title: Pirate enters the neon tunnels
rounds.question: 96 chips are shared between 8 hackers, then each hacker gains 4 more chips. Which path shows the final amount per hacker?

rounds.title: The Neon Core creates a final illusion
rounds.question: 8 groups of 9 drones fly above the city, then 28 crash. Which path shows how many remain?

stages.title: Neon symbols flash across the towers
stages.mechanic_reason: Symbol substitution requires multi-step calculation using larger numbers.
stages.success_message: The symbols are decoded, Pirate! The network weakens!

rounds.title: Neon symbols flash across the towers
The cyber monkey attacks the network
The Neon Core sends corrupted signals
The city systems collapse around Pirate
The cyber monkey unleashes full power

stages.title: Pirate races through the neon streets
stages.mechanic_reason: Timed challenges test speed and accuracy under pressure with multi-step expressions.
stages.success_message: Lightning fast, Pirate! The Neon Core is in sight!

rounds.title: Pirate races through the neon streets
The cyber systems overload
The Neon Core pulses faster
Pirate dodges the drone swarm
The city enters critical overload

stages.title: Pirate reaches the Neon Core chamber
stages.mechanic_reason: The boss stage mixes all five mechanics for a final multi-skill challenge.
stages.success_message: Pirate, you've shut down the Neon Core and freed the city!

rounds.title: Pirate reaches the Neon Core chamber
rounds.statement: 144 energy cells shared between 12 towers gives 12 cells per tower

rounds.title: The cyber monkey corrupts the city signals
rounds.statement: 9 drone groups with 8 drones each, minus 12 drones, leaves 68 drones

rounds.title: The city begins to collapse
rounds.prompt: 12 neon towers generate 9 energy cells each. Then 38 cells are destroyed by the cyber monkey. How many cells remain?

rounds.title: Pirate hacks the final control system
rounds.prompt: 96 data chips are shared equally between 8 hackers. Then each hacker finds 7 extra chips. How many chips does each hacker have now?

rounds.title: The monkey distorts the neon network
rounds.question: 108 chips are shared between 9 hackers, then each hacker doubles their chips. Which path shows the final amount per hacker?

rounds.title: The Neon Core creates a dangerous illusion
rounds.question: 8 groups of 12 drones fly above the city, then 28 crash. Which path shows how many remain?

rounds.title: The Neon Core sends corrupted signals
The cyber monkey unleashes full power
Pirate races through collapsing neon streets
Final attack on the Neon Core
